当前编辑范围没有匹配的可翻译元素：{scope}: No matching translatable elements in the current editor scope: {scope}
当前搜索或状态过滤没有匹配结果: No results match the current search or status filter
所选内容节点及其子节点没有可翻译元素: The selected content nodes and descendants have no translatable elements
当前分支可见范围没有可翻译元素: The current branch-visible scope has no translatable elements
整个项目还没有可翻译元素: The whole project does not have translatable elements yet
必须指定术语语言与翻译语言: Must specify term language and translation language
术语或翻译表不能为空: Terms or translations cannot be empty
术语和翻译表行数必须相同: Terms and translations must have the same number of lines
选择术语语言与翻译语言，并以换行符分隔的方式键入左右一一对应的术语和翻译: Select term language and translation language, then enter terms and translations in a one-to-one correspondence separated by newlines
选择一个 Agent 并发送消息开始对话: Select an Agent and send a message to start a conversation
系统预置的 Agent 模板，启用后即可在编辑器中使用。: Pre-built agent templates. Enable them to use in the editor.
选择一个 LLM Provider 来驱动此 Agent。: Select an LLM Provider to power this agent.
未检测到 LLM Provider 插件，请先安装并启用 LLM Provide: No LLM Provider plugin detected. Please install and enable one first.
仅在当前项目中可用的自定义 Agent。: Custom agents available only in the current project.
暂无项目级 Agent，可在编辑器中使用内置 Agent。: No project-level agents yet. You can use built-in agents in the editor.
从文档中自动提取候选术语并存入术语库: Automatically extract candidate terms from documents and add them to the glossary
系统将使用你选择的翻译建议器，以及项目绑定的术语库和记忆库，自动为文档中尚未翻译: The system will use your selected translation advisor, the project's glossaries, and translation memories to automatically fill in untranslated content.
多高匹配度的记忆会被采用？: What is the minimum similarity for a memory to be used?
使用 LLM 对翻译结果进行术语一致性和风格精修: Use LLM to refine translations for terminology consistency and style
收集相邻已有翻译作为 LLM 精修上下文，提升译文连贯性: Collect adjacent translations as LLM refinement context to improve consistency
有人在你的翻译上留下了评论: Someone left a comment on your translation
当前表单有未保存修改: The current form has unsaved changes
确认从当前作用域卸载此插件？配置实例也会被删除。: Uninstall this plugin from the current scope? Configuration instances will also be deleted.
此插件已挂载运行时路由: This plugin has mounted runtime routes
请重试应用或手动重载；必要时重启服务。: Please retry apply or reload manually; restart the service if needed.
部分检测会调用外部服务，可能消耗配额；系统会使用最小样例输入。: Some probes call external services and may consume quota; the system uses minimal sample inputs.
检测是显式操作，不会在输入时自动触发。: Probing is explicit and will not run automatically while you edit.
邮件服务不执行通用检测，以避免误发邮件。: Email services do not run the generic probe to avoid sending unintended mail.
向量存储没有通用的低副作用检测方式。: Vector storage has no generic low-side-effect probe.
此服务类型没有平台内置通用检测。: This service type has no built-in platform probe.
此服务类型不支持平台内置检测。: This service type does not support the built-in platform probe.
插件服务实现与声明的类型不匹配。: The plugin service implementation does not match its declared type.
此检测可能消耗外部服务配额。: This probe may consume external service quota.
插件已安装，但激活失败。数据已保留，可稍后重试。: Plugin installed, but activation failed. Data was preserved and you can retry later.
插件必须先安装才能保存配置: The plugin must be installed before saving configuration
插件未声明配置项: The plugin does not declare configuration
保存已有配置时必须携带配置版本，请刷新后重试。: Saving existing configuration requires a configuration version. Refresh and try again.
插件配置已被其他请求修改，请刷新后重试。: Plugin configuration was modified by another request. Refresh and try again.
配置保存失败：未获得配置实例: Configuration save failed: no configuration instance was returned
插件配置应用失败，已恢复旧配置: Applying plugin configuration failed, and the previous configuration was restored
插件配置应用失败，自动回滚也失败: Applying plugin configuration failed, and automatic rollback also failed
